calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Enforce The No Contest Clause Against Matthew A. Guerra, To Ascertain Beneficiaries Of The Theodore P. Glaza Trust, And To Compel Trust Information
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions To Enforce The No Contest Clause Against Matthew A. Guerra, To Ascertain Beneficiaries Of The Theodore P. Glaza Trust, And To Compel Trust Information
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Matthew A. Guerras Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees In The Amount Of $61,454.50 Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 425.16(C)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Valerie Alter, Esq. for Mathew Guerra (Moving Party/Respondent). Laura MacFarlane, Esq. for Joseph Kaisersatt (Petitioner).

The Court addressed the appeal and its impact on the motion for attorneys fees on calendar before it today. Ms. Macfarlane briefly addressed the appeal and the defaults stating that they are going forward with the appeal. Ms. Alter stated that the Court can proceed with the motion before it today, referenced CCP 916, stated that this won't impact judgment on appeal, and noted that if there is an appeal that the appeals would be consolidated.

Following the Court's inquiry, the motion is ARGUED.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court granted Matthew A. Guerra's Motion for Attorneys Fees in the amounts reflected in the reply brief of $71,490.00 in fees and $1,602.40 in costs. Ms. Alter is to prepare a proposed order pursuant to CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Rosado. Matter not reported.

Petition For Instructions To Enforce The No Contest Clause Against Matthew A. Guerra, To Ascertain Beneficiaries Of The Theodore P. Glaza Trust, And To Compel Trust Information
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions To Enforce The No Contest Clause Against Matthew A. Guerra, To Ascertain Beneficiaries Of The Theodore P. Glaza Trust, And
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Matthew A. Guerra?S Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Keith Davidson and Michelle Nguyen appeared by zoom for Joseph Kaisersatt.
Valerie Alter and Tomasene Knight appeared by zoom for Matthew Guerra.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding whether Petitioner had met prong two of the anti-SLAPP motion requirements, whether or not Probate Code 21312 applies, whether or not Petitioner triggered the Trust instrument's No-Contest Clause, whether or not the 2011 IRA designation is a protected instrument under Probate Code 21310, whether or not the 2011 IRA designation is part of an "integrated estate plan," how to correctly read the phrase "integrated estate plan" in the context of the Trust instrument's No-Contest Clause, whether or not the IRA is outside of the trust, whether or not Schedule A is irrelevant, what the decedent's intent was as the Trust settlor, what the decedent's intent and understanding was when executing the 2021 IRA designation document, whether or not Respondent had probable cause to challenge the 2011 IRA designation, what is required of the party opposing an anti-SLAPP in order to meet the required showing of "minimum merit" on the challenged claims, etc. Upon conclusion of argument, the Special Motion to Strike is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Wu. Reporter: Kim Meierotto, CSR #11602, 510-866-8138, kimcsr@comcast.net
